notes:
Batch-C (61 entries). Classification:
- buy_credits_banner.rs (9): all UI banner/tooltip/error text -> translate.
- model/early_output.rs (8): all are safe_debug! macro args (resolves to log::debug! only) -> flag_telemetry_payload.
- model/tmux/parser.rs (8): all flow through report_parse_error -> TmuxMessage::ParseError {message, byte}, but the message field is discarded by every consumer (`message: _`) and only `parse_error = true` is set. Strings never reach UI -> flag_telemetry_payload (developer diagnostic only).
- session_settings.rs (10): all are settings macro `description:` fields surfaced in the settings panel tooltip -> translate.
- shared_session/share_modal/body.rs (8): pure share-modal UI -> translate.
- shared_session/sharer/network.rs (10): 
   - 663 'Failed to create shared session' is an anyhow .context() chained into report_error! macro (log only) -> telemetry_payload.
   - 810 'Websocket closed before starting session' lives in InternalServerError { details } but every consumer discards `details` (`.. ` / `_`) and uses a generic user-facing message instead -> telemetry_payload.
   - 1085 .expect('Can add durations') -> panic_message.
   - 1259/1262/1271/1274/1280/1289/1292 are direct user-facing strings returned to UI -> translate.
- view/ambient_agent/loading_screen.rs (8): all UI Text/Button labels and error dialog text -> translate.
Glossary: kept `Warp`, `Agent`/`agent`, `GitHub`, `Oz`, `shell`, `chip`, `toast`, `PS1`, `CLI`, `AI` as English brand/identifier terms. Preserved trailing space in 01KQXQV12E1VJC5N4514R5CY4M ('Purchasing these credits would take you over your monthly spend limit. ') -- target also ends with trailing ASCII space because the next fragment is the 'Increase it' hyperlink. Preserved {} placeholder in 01KQXQV12H38NZP0BNY33RJ8EY (selected_credits, a number, so Chinese function-words around it are safe) and 01KQXQV12JWR2TY9BGY04PNWJZ ('Your agent is currently running on a {} machine. ' — {} is a `specs` string description like 'GPU' / '64GB RAM', kept English nominal placement). 01KQXQV12FXDPHH2QNMR1PHC23 preserves {max_bytes}. 01KQXQV120H77DY9K031PRHSS5 ' for more powerful cloud agents.' is the trailing fragment after the 'Upgrade' hyperlink — translated with leading full-width comma '，' so it reads naturally after the link text. Used 您 throughout. ASCII '...' not present in any source.
